name: 18oz Plastic Tall Textured Tumbler - Threshold™
description:
Update your drinkware collection with the textural look of this 18-Ounce Plastic Tall Textured Tumbler from Threshold™. Perfect for everyday use, this tall tumbler lets you enjoy a variety of cold beverages like juice, soda and iced tea. Enjoy the clean look and stunning texture of this plastic drinkware that will naturally shine in the light and give the liquids it holds a cool look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
